name: Gateau Nancy
recipeInstructions:
A recipe for this ingredient can be found elsewhere in this packet.
In a bowl, combine the chocolate, butter, Grand Marnier, vanilla extract, and almond powder. Melt these ingredients over a double boiler. Remove from heat once melted and gently whip to combine.
In another bowl, whisk egg yolks with 3/4 cup sugar until a white ribbon forms (about 5-7 minutes). Gently blend the sugar/yolk mixture into the chocolate mixture using a spatula.
In a third bowl, vigorously whisk egg whites. Gradually add 3/4 cup sugar while continuing to whip until the mixture is lightly firm. Fold in the egg whites/sugar mixture into the chocolate mixture gently for a soufflé texture.
Grease and flour two molds measuring 10 inches in diameter and 2 inches deep. Place parchment paper at the bottom of each mold. Pour half of the mixture into each mold. Bake at 275°F for 1 hour and 20 minutes.
Remove from molds and cool on a rack before serving. Sprinkle with powdered sugar and serve with Creme Anglaise.
